'''鈭歵h-t-j-g''' ('''kathatjegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tin|tin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tin|tin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-t-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathatjegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatjegoko|thithatjegoko]] || [[word:jithatjegoko|jithatjegoko]] || [[word:shithatjegoko|shithatjegoko]] || [[word:kithatjegoko|kithatjegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatjegoko|thuthuthatjegoko]] || [[word:jujuthatjegoko|jujuthatjegoko]] || [[word:shushuthatjegoko|shushuthatjegoko]] || [[word:kukuthatjegoko|kukuthatjegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatjegoko|thuthatjegoko]] || [[word:juthatjegoko|juthatjegoko]] || [[word:shuthatjegoko|shuthatjegoko]] || [[word:kuthatjegoko|kuthatjegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatjegoko|thuthatjegoko]] || [[word:juthatjegoko|juthatjegoko]] || [[word:shuthatjegoko|shuthatjegoko]] || [[word:kuthatjegoko|kuthatjegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatjegoko|thethatjegoko]] || [[word:jethatjegoko|jethatjegoko]] || [[word:shethatjegoko|shethatjegoko]] || [[word:kethatjegoko|kethatjegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatjegoko|thothothatjegoko]] || [[word:jojothatjegoko|jojothatjegoko]] || [[word:shoshothatjegoko|shoshothatjegoko]] || [[word:kokothatjegoko|kokothatjegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatjegoko|thothatjegoko]] || [[word:jothatjegoko|jothatjegoko]] || [[word:shothatjegoko|shothatjegoko]] || [[word:kothatjegoko|kothatjegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatjegoko|thothatjegoko]] || [[word:jothatjegoko|jothatjegoko]] || [[word:shothatjegoko|shothatjegoko]] || [[word:kothatjegoko|kothatjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thatjegoko|th忙thatjegoko]] || [[word:j忙thatjegoko|j忙thatjegoko]] || [[word:sh忙thatjegoko|sh忙thatjegoko]] || [[word:k忙thatjegoko|k忙thatjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatjegoko|thathathatjegoko]] || [[word:jajathatjegoko|jajathatjegoko]] || [[word:shashathatjegoko|shashathatjegoko]] || [[word:kakathatjegoko|kakathatjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatjegoko|thathatjegoko]] || [[word:jathatjegoko|jathatjegoko]] || [[word:shathatjegoko|shathatjegoko]] || [[word:kathatjegoko|kathatjegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatjegoko|thathatjegoko]] || [[word:jathatjegoko|jathatjegoko]] || [[word:shathatjegoko|shathatjegoko]] || [[word:kathatjegoko|kathatjegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathatjegithi|shathatjegithi]] || [[word:shathatjegiji|shathatjegiji]] || [[word:shathatjegishi|shathatjegishi]] || [[word:shathatjegiki|shathatjegiki]]
